title: lyonia rubiginosa var. costata
intro: Lyonia rubiginosa var. costata, also known as the Lyonia, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Ericaceae family, native to the southeastern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lyonia rubiginosa var. costata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Lyonia is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
